Failure Mode: Crash load-path folding initiates outside intended crush zone
Effect: Occupant crash pulse may exceed target
Cause: Local rail section is too soft near shotgun interface
Prevention Control: Full vehicle crash CAE load-path review
Detection Control: Frontal crash physical barrier test with teardown
Recommended Action: Add internal bulkhead and increase weld density at shotgun node

Failure Mode: Spot weld fatigue at rail flange
Effect: Reduced load transfer and durability degradation
Cause: Weld pitch selected from static strength instead of cyclic strain map
Prevention Control: Weld pitch review against CAE hot spots
Detection Control: Rail assembly durability rig with weld teardown
Recommended Action: Reduce weld pitch to 35 mm in high strain zone and add adhesive continuity check

Function: Prevent trapped moisture at front rail overlap
Effect: Long term section loss and reduced crash energy absorption
Cause: No drain path in closed rail flange and blocked e-coat flow
Recommended Action: Add two 12 mm drain holes and verify e-coat film build by section cut

Effect: Bracket loosening and local rail crack during service load
Cause: Fastener edge distance below 2.5 times hole diameter
Prevention Control: Attachment design review per fastener guideline
Detection Control: Static pull-out test and shaker durability test
Recommended Action: Increase edge distance and add local emboss around fastener
